cards.back: A data structure that stores key-value pairs in an array using a hash function to map keys to indices
A Last-In-First-Out (LIFO) data structure that follows the principle of last element inserted is the first one to be removed
A First-In-First-Out (FIFO) data structure that follows the principle of first element inserted is the first one to be removed

cards.front: What is a tree data structure?
cards.back: A hierarchical data structure consisting of nodes with a value and zero or more child nodes

cards.front: What is a graph data structure?
cards.back: A non-linear data structure consisting of nodes and edges that connect nodes to form a network
